DESCRIPTION.<MODEL_ID>.Binary.<VALUES>: A binary install job that downloads a standalone executable and installs it to a target path.
DESCRIPTION.<MODEL_ID>.Binary.<VALUES>.DownloadURL.<: Direct URL to the standalone binary file to download.
Directory where the binary will be downloaded before being moved into place.
DESCRIPTION.<MODEL_ID>.Binary.<VALUES>.InstallPath.<: Final destination path for the installed binary executable.
DESCRIPTION.<MODEL_ID>.Binary.<VALUES>.PostInstall.<: Shell commands executed after the binary is installed (optional extra setup).
DESCRIPTION.<MODEL_ID>.Binary.<VALUES>.PostUninstall: Shell commands executed during uninstall cleanup (optional extra cleanup).
